message:
docs: fix confusing example that created unused runner

The LoggedPackTestRunner example created two runner variables where
the first was immediately shadowed by the second and never used. This
was confusing and wasteful. Changed to show Option 1 (recommended) as
active code and Option 2 as commented alternative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
